findings.title: Production_ready closeout artifacts not yet present
findings.summary: Claude noted this was expected for the implemented state because claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are produced by the closeout process before production_ready promotion.

findings.title: Coordinated status churn required to flip
findings.summary: Claude noted that production_ready promotion must update model policy status, contract definition status, test assertion, current_subphase, and subphase_closeouts together.

findings.title: Two ownership representations exist by design
findings.summary: Claude noted the contract type-shape ownership inventory and S06 executable ownership policy use different vocabularies, which is acceptable because they are different layers.

raw_result_excerpt: overall_verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; No P0/P1/P2 issues; nothing in the code or contract blocks subphase closeout.
